message:
chore(gitignore): widen .claude/ and cover dot-prefixed .beads.snapshot_*/

Two ephemeral-artifact classes were slipping through `git status` during
multi-agent sweeps:

1. `.claude/settings.local.json` was ignored, but the harness also writes
   `.claude/scheduled_tasks.lock` (and occasionally other transient
   state) alongside it. Widen to ignore the whole `.claude/` directory —
   nothing in there is source-of-truth for this repo.

2. `.beads_snapshot_*/` was already ignored, but `br` also writes a
   separate snapshot directory named `.beads.snapshot_YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ/`
   with a DOT between `beads` and `snapshot`, not an underscore. The
   existing pattern doesn't match it, so these timestamped snapshot
   dirs were persistently dirty in the working tree. Add the dotted
   variant alongside the existing underscore variant so both shapes
   are covered regardless of which br version wrote them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -83,8 +83,8 @@ crates/*/target/
 target-codex*/
 target_*/
 
-# Claude local settings
-.claude/settings.local.json
+# Claude local settings + agent scratch dir (scheduled_tasks.lock, settings.local.json, etc.)
+.claude/
 
 # Agent mail project identity
 .agent-mail-project-id
@@ -111,6 +111,7 @@ storage.recovered.sqlite3
 .beads/beads.db.stale_*
 .beads/recovery_*/
 .beads_snapshot_*/
+.beads.snapshot_*/
 
 # Ephemeral scratch files
 baseline_decisions
